ec2.ipamresourcediscoveryassociation.Cfn: An IPAM resource discovery association. An associated resource discovery is a resource discovery that has been associated with an IPAM. IPAM aggregates the resource CIDRs discovered by the associated resource discovery.

ec2.ipamresourcediscoveryassociation.Tag.Description: A tag is a label that you assign to an AWS resource. Each tag consists of a key and an optional value. You can use tags to search and filter your resources or track your AWS costs.
